contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: currency_conversion.html — Warehouse Manager picker
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/226
  
  Details:
  Added a required Warehouse Manager picker to dapp/currency_conversion.html so the resulting Transactions rows on the managed AGL ledger get the right Entity (column C) — i.e. the person whose source-currency balance is debited and target-currency balance is credited. Without this, both rows were ending up with the Reporter Name (signature owner), which is wrong whenever the submitter isn't the same person whose balance actually moved.
  
  Pattern follows the existing Managed Ledger picker on the same page: simple <select> populated from DAO_FORMS_BASE?list=true (TreasuryCache.getManagers when the cache is loaded, falls back to direct GAS fetch). Loaded in parallel with ledgers on page boot. Required for submit; submit button stays disabled until a manager is selected. Adds one line to the signed [CURRENCY CONVERSION EVENT] payload: '- Warehouse Manager: <name>' (immediately after '- Ledger URL: ...').
  
  Service-worker CACHE_NAME bumped v9 -> v10 so the updated HTML page actually gets re-fetched (without the bump, users with the SW would silently keep using the older copy without the new required field).
  
  Receiving GAS update + Edgar webhook hook are tracked separately (not part of this contribution).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
